campus.name: Port Said Campus
campus.description: Strategic coastal campus adjacent to the Suez Canal, focused on international transport, ports, logistics, and trade-related education.

college.name: College of International Transport and Logistics – Port Said
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Flagship logistics and transport education hub with strong alignment to maritime trade, ports, and national logistics mega-projects.
college.vision: To strengthen higher education leadership in the Middle East and Africa as a center of expertise in international transportation and logistics.
college.mission: To provide an integrated educational, training, and research environment aligned with international quality standards, emphasizing applied logistics, modern technologies, and industry-linked learning to produce graduates capable of supporting sustainable development.

national: National Authority for Quality Assurance and Accreditation of Education (NAQAAE)
international: Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB)

quality_assurance.description: Quality assurance aligned with NAQAAE standards and AACSB international benchmarks.

degree.degree_name: B.Sc. in Trade Logistics and International Transport Management

departments_programs.name: Logistics and International Trade Management
departments_programs.focus: International trade operations, customs, freight forwarding, trade logistics

departments_programs.name: Transport Logistics Management
departments_programs.focus: Ports, maritime transport, multimodal transport, transport economics

departments_programs.name: Logistics and Supply Chain Management
departments_programs.focus: Supply chain integration, inventory, procurement, distribution systems

departments_programs.name: Petroleum and Energy Logistics Management
departments_programs.focus: Energy supply chains, petroleum logistics, hazardous cargo transport

training_and_industry.geographic_advantage: Direct exposure to ports, maritime trade routes, and Suez Canal logistics ecosystem

research_and_consulting.regional_role: Acts as a consulting and expertise hub for logistics and transport sectors in Egypt and the Arab region

strategic_goals.education: Enhance student learning outcomes and labor market readiness
strategic_goals.research: Expand applied and collaborative research projects
strategic_goals.internationalization: Strengthen global partnerships and international exposure
strategic_goals.social_responsibility: Support sustainable development goals economically, socially, and environmentally

best_for: Students interested in maritime and port-related logistics
Students motivated by national mega-projects and global trade
less_suitable_for: Students avoiding applied or field-oriented learning
